name: Athletic Girl with Ribbed Top
description: Athletic Eurasian girl with a bright smile. Gal Gadot's smile/eyes + Eiza González's jawline. Deep brown wavy bob. Tanned skin.
anchor: Strong jawline, high cheekbones, deep-set eyes, thick slightly arched eyebrows, straight nose. Radiant wide smile. Voluminous wavy dark brown bob. Tanned/olive skin. Athletic toned body with defined abs. No visible tattoos.
